description: validate a MONAI datalist and finetune the NV-Generate-CTMR MR-brain diffusion UNet (preflight or GPU training)
rules: validates the datalist (non-empty training[], relative image paths resolvable under DATA_BASE_DIR) before staging
stages the three upstream config JSONs, rewriting only run paths + n_epochs
delegates to upstream scripts.diff_model_create_training_data, scripts.diff_model_train, and optionally scripts.diff_model_infer
--preflight stages + validates without launching GPU training; a real run trains and is destructive
emits one structured-JSON result line and always writes result.json under RECORD_STORE
usage: Set DATALIST, DATA_BASE_DIR, and PREFLIGHT ('1' to validate/stage only). Requires NV_GENERATE_ROOT to point at an NV-Generate-CTMR checkout for staging; a real run also needs CUDA, upstream pip deps, and MR-brain weights. Output: result.json + an artifacts/ tree under RECORD_STORE.
limitation: Thin wrapper; embedding extraction, training, and inference run via upstream scripts. Requires a current NV-Generate-CTMR checkout. Full training is expensive and non-deterministic across hardware/CUDA/package versions. Gates file accounting and command provenance only — not anatomical realism or downstream utility. Not for clinical deployment, interpretation, autonomous diagnosis, regulatory submission, or production training-data approval.
